base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of mouser_flipper_roadkill — a character (minion) from 1991 turtles in time. Mouser robots (from Baxter) + Flipper + Roadkill Rodney minions. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
